creator: cs@cheasy.de
text:
After building kde again from source using the kde11-port, eterm
detects the imlib. I uninstalled and reinstalled the port again, now
it worked. Thus I consider the problem to be on my side, although I
cannot tell what nuked the imlib enty from /var/db/...
Anyhow, this PR may be closed.
-Christoph Sold
